Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.util.statistics.OrdinalStatisticalTest

Packages that use OrdinalStatisticalTest
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.util.statistics
Collection of statistical methods for determining certain properties of collected samples.

  • Uses of OrdinalStatisticalTest in org.moeaframework.util.statistics

    Subclasses of OrdinalStatisticalTest in org.moeaframework.util.statistics
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    KruskalWallisTest
    The Kruskal-Wallis One-Way Analysis of Variance by Ranks is a non-parametric statistical test determining if (at least) two out of K >= 2 populations have differing medians.
    class 
    MannWhitneyUTest
    The Mann-Whitney U test determines if two populations have different medians.
    class 
    WilcoxonSignedRanksTest
    The Wilcoxon Signed-Ranks test determines if the population median is equal to a specified value.
